description_long: This is a stand-up pouch of Gibs Mayonnaise, featuring a blue gradient background with a large heart-shaped label on the front. The front displays appetizing images of fries, a hamburger, and a bowl of creamy mayonnaise, emphasizing its creamy and smooth texture. The top of the pouch has a small white spout for dispensing the mayonnaise, which is typical for squeezable condiment packaging. The back of the pouch contains detailed product information, including ingredients and nutritional facts, printed in white and yellow text. The sides of the pouch are narrow and show the continuation of the blue gradient and some product graphics. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention in a retail or urban food setting.
description: A blue stand-up pouch of Gibs Mayonnaise with a heart-shaped label, food imagery, and a white dispensing spout. The packaging is visually appealing and features product and nutritional information on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Gibs brand, heart-shaped mayonnaise label, food images, and the dispensing spout at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the pouch and a glimpse of the front and back graphics.
description_view_2: Back view displaying detailed product information, ingredients, and nutritional labeling in white and yellow text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim edge of the pouch and partial continuation of the front and back designs.
attribute_brand_logo: A red and white square logo with the word 'Gibs' in black, located at the top center of the front and back of the pouch.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front label and graphics indicate 'Mayonnaise' with the text 'Creamy & Smooth' and images of fries, a burger, and a bowl of mayonnaise.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the back of the pouch in white and yellow text.
